case_title: ANN DURKIN ET AL VS. WEI D CAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 21 CENTURY INSURANCE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO 21 CENTURY INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-29-2015 AT 3:30 PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($50.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JAN-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAO, WEI D DBA. WANNA TECHATANA PASON
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO 21ST CENTURY RETURNED+RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,450.47 FILED BY DURKIN, ANN DURKIN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CAO, WEI D DBA. WANNA TECHATANA PASON 21 CENTURY INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURKIN, ANN DURKIN, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-26-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST 21 ST. CENTURY INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WEI CAO WAS NOT SERVED, HE WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT BUT WERE REPRESENTED BY PAUL LUCIA--PRIVATE INSURANCE (LICENSED). PLAINTIFFS (2) MUST BOTH APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE TO PRESENT THEIR CASE TO THE COURT; AS PAUL LUCIA WAS NOT ALLOWED TO REPRESENT THEM AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT 21 ST. CENTURY INSURANCE WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON TING--CLAIM REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DURKIN, ANN DURKIN, ROBERT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 21 CENTURY INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURKIN, ANN DURKIN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAO, WEI D DBA. WANNA TECHATANA PASON $3,855.97 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,995.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAO, WEI D DBA. WANNA TECHATANA PASON 21 CENTURY INSURANCE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURKIN, ANN DURKIN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT 21 CENTURY INSURANCE
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (ISSUED:FEB-24-15 FOR: JASON TING;SERVED: MARCH 12, 2015)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL THE PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS ANNA BARR IS SWORN AND EXAMINED NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
